title: [codereview-pass3] handle_frame_rpl:316 ignores route_updated for Gateway.routes population
description: In RplNode::handle_frame_rpl the DaoReceived event returns route_updated from process_dao but caller in gateway forwarding does not use it to call add_route with DAO-derived path/nexthop. No path-to-NodeId conversion either. P0. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-fy9q
close_reason: Fixed rpl handle_frame_rpl route_updated sync to Gateway.routes and RoutingTable; matched lichen-node/rust style; no comments/dead code; quality gates passed
